capture_commands.current_boot_panic_probe: sudo -n log show --last bounded window filtered for AirportItlwm/panic/remote-debugger
capture_commands.post_reboot_loaded_identity: kextstat and kmutil showloaded filtered for AirportItlwm plus dwarfdump UUID and binary sha256
capture_commands.reboot: sudo -n shutdown -r now; poll SSH on devops@127.0.0.1:3322
